weekend_readiness.liv_recommendation: Activate fresh content on talent announcements; leverage Westend debut angle for differentiation vs. established competitors.

content_gaps.description: Encore Beach Club heavily promoting Marshmello 2026 residency; no equivalent LIV residency announcement visible in organic or paid channels.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Confirm and announce any LIV resident DJ lineup for April-May; build TikTok hype via influencer previews.

content_gaps.description: Competitors leveraging guest-list promoters on TikTok (Edwin @livlvguestlist, @globeth0tter reviews) for organic reach; LIV social accounts appear to rely on official content only.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Partner with 3-5 micro-influencers (5K-50K followers) for genuine guest-list takeovers and venue reviews; amplify via LIV official accounts.

content_gaps.description: Major venues (OMNIA, Hakkasan, Zouk) actively using Instagram Stories for countdown/flash-sale content; no detected story activity from LIV in past 72 hours.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Implement 48-hour countdown Stories for weekend events; feature ticket-link CTAs and capacity warnings.
